response.global_analysis: Audio phonetically matches the JSON reference for the song 'Bunny Girl'. Reference JSON contains partial lyrics; I have transcribed the full song performance and the subsequent dialogue section. Confirmed text matches full audio duration without early cutoffs or cross-pause merging. On-screen lyrics used for accuracy in song transcription, and burnt-in dialogue subtitles (Indonesian and English) used to guide transcription and translation of Ollie's spoken Japanese.

subtitles.original: 夜の始まりさ Bunny Girl
subtitles.english: It's the beginning of the night, Bunny Girl
By the heartbeats that tempt me

subtitles.english: A toast to love in the bursting conflict
Even if I can't convey it

subtitles.english: It's the beginning of love, Bunny Girl

subtitles.original: 誰かを穿って 澄んだ君の目を
subtitles.english: Prying into someone, harboring those clear eyes

Bunny Girl
Lyrics, Music: AKASAKI
Now

subtitles.original: キザなステップを刻んで
subtitles.english: Take some stylish steps
The fatigue after work
Is with me and this glass
Now
Wind it to your liking
Your feelings toward the world
Won't you pour them into me?

subtitles.original: ありきたりなラブソングでも
subtitles.english: Even in a common love song
Love is poured into it
Even so, it gets tainted
I can tell by looking at you
Your eyes that look down

subtitles.original: 無理やり剥ごうとはしない
subtitles.english: I won't try to pry them open by force

subtitles.original: だからそんな顔せず手を差し伸べて
subtitles.english: So don't make that face, just reach out your hand
See?

subtitles.english: Harboring those clear eyes
Feeling like I know your love
Getting high
Sensitivity fading away
Crying every time

subtitles.original: それくらいがいいんでしょ
subtitles.english: That's good enough, isn't it?

subtitles.original: さあ キザなステップを刻んで
subtitles.english: Now, take some stylish steps
Your complexion, now

subtitles.original: マシになってきてるから
subtitles.english: Because it's getting better

subtitles.original: 君に委ねるわ Bunny Girl
subtitles.english: I'll leave it to you, Bunny Girl

subtitles.english: I'll give you myself, Bunny Girl

subtitles.original: 夜の始まりさ Bunny Girl
subtitles.english: It's the beginning of the night, Bunny Girl
Prying into someone

subtitles.original: 澄んだ君の目を孕んで
subtitles.english: Harboring those clear eyes
Booh!

subtitles.original: 見つけた！ずっと探してたんだ！
subtitles.english: There you are! I was looking everywhere for you!

subtitles.original: かくれんぼしてるなんて教えてくれなかったじゃないか～
subtitles.english: You didn't tell me that we were playing hide and seek...

subtitles.original: やった～！ついにオリーのネオンステージに来てくれたんだね！
subtitles.english: Well, I see you've made it to my neon stage, ya!

subtitles.original: どうかな？キラキラしてて可愛いでしょ？
subtitles.english: How you like it? It's really pretty, right?

subtitles.original: 全力で頑張って作ったんだよ～！
subtitles.english: I put a lot of effort into it!

subtitles.original: ネオンもいっぱいあるの！
subtitles.english: It's a lot of neons and whatnot!
And um, while you were hiding,

subtitles.original: こっそりお着替えもしちゃったの！
subtitles.english: I had the time to change my clothes.

subtitles.original: オリー、めっちゃ可愛くなったでしょ～？
subtitles.english: oh~ Don't I look super cute~?

subtitles.original: へへ～ まだまだ君のために
subtitles.english: Hehe~ Actually, I still have a lot

subtitles.original: 準備したものがたくさんあるんだ～
subtitles.english: that I prepared for you!

subtitles.original: だから、このかくれんぼは
subtitles.english: So I hope that we can put a rest
to this hide and seek.
Hah? No?
Hey, you...
since you got here,

subtitles.original: なんだかずっと様子がおかしいよ？
subtitles.english: you've been acting kind of weird...
